cards.title: AI Adoption Boosts Entry-Level Hiring, Report Finds
cards.body: High-intensity AI adopters increased headcount by 10.2%, with entry-level positions rising 12%. The data counters claims that AI eliminates junior jobs.

cards.title: Base44 Launches Own AI Model for Defensibility
cards.body: Wix-owned coding platform Base44 is rolling out its proprietary AI model. The company aims to eventually outperform frontier models.

cards.title: Google Expands Free Gemini Image Generation in US
cards.body: Eligible free Gemini users can now create personalized AI images based on interests and connected Google app data. The feature is rolling out across the US.

cards.title: Anthropic Offers Claude to California at Half Price
cards.body: Anthropic has struck a deal with California to provide Claude access at 50% discount to state government. The partnership marks deepening ties with the state.

cards.title: South Korea Commits $550B to Memory Chip Expansion
cards.body: The world's two largest memory chip companies are building new fabs to address supply demands. South Korea positions itself as a global AI tech leader.

cards.title: Arena AI Leaderboard Valued at $100 Million
cards.body: The popular free AI leaderboard platform has reached unicorn status after launching commercial services. The startup launched its paid offering just last September.

cards.title: Cursor Launches Mobile App for Coding Agents
cards.body: The coding platform released a new mobile app for remote oversight of coding agents. Users can now guide agents while on the go.

cards.title: TIDAL Cuts Off AI Music Monetization
cards.body: The streaming service will remove AI-generated music attempting to impersonate artists or groups. TIDAL is using automated tools to enforce the policy.

cards.title: Proception Settles Tesla Suit, Raises $11M
cards.body: The robot hand company settled a trade secret dispute with Tesla and announced new funding. Proception is developing unique approaches to robotic hand training data.

cards.title: Omen AI Raises $31M for Data Center Optimization
cards.body: Omen AI secured Series A funding to monitor chip coolant systems in data centers. The startup aims to prevent bacterial outbreaks and improve efficiency.

cards.title: Ford Rehires Engineers After AI Falls Short
cards.body: Ford is bringing back experienced engineers as AI implementation failed to meet product quality standards. The automaker acknowledged overreliance on AI for production.

cards.title: Wall Street Eyes Micron as Next Nvidia
cards.body: Investors believe Micron, a US memory maker, could follow Nvidia's success trajectory. Wall Street is searching for more public AI-related investment opportunities.

cards.title: Skepticism Grows Over Orbital Data Centers
cards.body: SoftBank's CEO and others are questioning Elon Musk's vision for orbital data centers. The concept faces significant technical and economic scrutiny.

cards.title: Apple Vision Pro Executive Joins OpenAI
cards.body: Paul Meade, Apple VP for Vision Pro, is reportedly joining OpenAI's hardware team. The move signals OpenAI's commitment to building its own devices.

cards.title: Founder Uses Claude to Fight Cancer Diagnosis
cards.body: Entrepreneur Conno Christou fed medical data and personal records into Claude to develop cancer treatment strategies. The AI helped analyze blood results, scans, and wearable data.

cards.title: Asian Startups Launch Mythos-Rival Models
cards.body: New AI models launching in Asia offer Mythos-like capabilities without US export restrictions. The development could reshape the global AI market landscape.

cards.title: Trump Admin Authorizes Mythos Use by 100+ Entities
cards.body: Over 100 US companies and government agencies gained authorization to use Mythos 5. The release includes approval for non-American employees of authorized organizations.

cards.title: OpenAI Limits GPT-5.6 Rollout After Government Request
cards.body: OpenAI delayed GPT-5.6 expansion following a government request, warning restrictions limit tool availability. The company opposes making government access a long-term default process.

cards.title: OpenAI Poaches Uber India Chief for Leadership
cards.body: OpenAI hired a former Uber India executive to lead operations in its biggest non-US market. The move marks continued expansion in India with offices and partnerships.

cards.title: Tech Giants Build Custom AI Chips to Challenge Nvidia
cards.body: OpenAI, Google, Apple, and SpaceX are developing proprietary AI chips, ending Nvidia's total market dominance. OpenAI's Jalapeño inference chip, built with Broadcom, signals the shift.

cards.title: AI Jobs Boom Contradicts Job-Loss Narrative
cards.body: A new report shows high-intensity AI adopters increased headcount by 10.2%, with entry-level hiring rising 12%. This directly counters the rhetoric that AI eliminates junior positions.

cards.title: Base44 Launches Own AI Model for Defensibility
cards.body: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 is rolling out its own AI model to compete with frontier models. The move reflects broader efforts by AI startups to reduce dependence on established providers.

cards.title: Google Expands Free Gemini Image Generation
cards.body: Gemini's personalized AI image generation is now free for eligible US users, creating images based on interests and connected Google app data. The expansion makes advanced AI capabilities more accessible to mainstream users.

cards.title: Anthropic Strikes California Government Deal
cards.body: Anthropic negotiated a deal allowing California government to use Claude at 50% discount. The partnership strengthens Anthropic's position as an alternative to OpenAI.

cards.title: South Korea Commits $550B to AI Infrastructure
cards.body: The world's two largest memory chip companies pledge major investment to build more memory fab labs amid a global shortage. South Korea is positioning itself as a critical AI hardware powerhouse.

cards.title: Arena AI Leaderboard Hits $100M Valuation
cards.body: The popular free AI model leaderboard launched its commercial service last September and has already achieved unicorn-adjacent valuations. Arena became essential infrastructure for tracking AI model performance.

cards.title: Cursor Launches Mobile Coding Agent App
cards.body: Cursor released a mobile app enabling remote oversight of coding agents on the go. The tool extends AI-assisted development beyond desktop environments.

cards.title: TIDAL Removes AI-Generated Music Impersonators
cards.body: The streaming platform will cut monetization and use automated tools to remove AI-generated music attempting to impersonate artists. TIDAL joins other platforms addressing AI music authenticity concerns.

cards.title: Robotics Startup Settles Tesla Trade Secret Suit
cards.body: Proception announced an $11M raise after settling a Tesla lawsuit, taking a unique approach to collecting robot hand training data. The company tackles one of robotics' hardest problems: dexterous manipulation.

cards.title: Omen AI Raises $31M for Data Center Optimization
cards.body: The startup uses AI to monitor chip coolant and prevent bacterial outbreaks in data centers. Omen's Series A reflects growing focus on AI infrastructure reliability.

cards.title: Ford Rehires Human Engineers After AI Fails
cards.body: Ford admitted that relying solely on AI for product development produced subpar results and is bringing back experienced engineers. The automaker acknowledged AI's limitations in manufacturing quality.

cards.title: Wall Street Eyes Micron as Next AI Chip Winner
cards.body: Investors seeking the next Nvidia-like winner are focusing on memory maker Micron as AI infrastructure demand surges. Micron's success hinges on sustained AI adoption growth.

cards.title: Skepticism Grows Over Orbital AI Data Centers
cards.body: SoftBank's CEO and others question Elon Musk's vision for orbital data centers. The hype around space-based AI infrastructure faces increasing industry scrutiny.

cards.title: Apple Vision Pro VP Joins OpenAI Hardware Team
cards.body: Paul Meade, Apple's VP overseeing Vision Pro headset, is leaving to join OpenAI's hardware division. The move signals intensifying competition between tech giants in AI hardware.

cards.title: Founder Uses Claude AI to Battle Cancer
cards.body: Entrepreneur Conno Christou fed blood results, scans, wearables data and journal entries into Claude to optimize his cancer-fighting regime. The case demonstrates Claude's potential in personalized health applications.

cards.title: Asian Startups Launch Mythos Alternatives Amid Ban
cards.body: New models launching in Asia promise Mythos-like capabilities without export ban risks as Anthropic faces US restrictions. The move signals potential Western AI labs could lose massive Asian markets.

cards.title: Trump Admin Authorizes Mythos for 100+ Companies
cards.body: Over 100 US companies and government agencies gained authorization to use Mythos 5, including non-American employees. The expanded access reflects government confidence in the model.

cards.title: OpenAI Limits GPT-5.6 Rollout After Government Request
cards.body: OpenAI restricted GPT-5.6's rollout citing government restrictions but stated this shouldn't become standard practice. The company argues limiting access hurts developers, enterprises, and cyber defenders.

cards.title: OpenAI Hires Uber India Chief for Expansion
cards.body: OpenAI poached a top Uber executive to lead operations in its biggest market outside the US. The hire reflects aggressive expansion plans for India's AI market.

cards.title: Tech Giants Build Custom AI Chips vs Nvidia
cards.body: OpenAI, Google, Apple, and SpaceX are building proprietary chips as Nvidia's AI chip dominance faces growing challenges. OpenAI's Jalapeño inference chip marks major shift toward supply chain independence.

cards.title: AI Agents Are Not Your Coworkers
cards.body: Despite marketing as "coworkers," AI agents lack human qualities companies attribute to them. The framing obscures both capabilities and limitations of agentic AI tools.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Investment Hits Inflection Point
cards.body: Gartner calls 2026 an "inflection year" for aligning AI projects with business strategy as ROI pressure mounts. Agentic AI is emerging as key tool for delivering measurable financial outcomes.

cards.title: Metrics Obscure as Much as They Reveal
cards.body: Metrics reveal useful insights but often corrupt or obscure critical information through their limitations. Understanding what metrics can't measure is essential for sound decision-making.

cards.title: Unprecedented OpenAI Restrictions Announced
cards.body: Government restrictions on OpenAI deployments represent unprecedented constraints on AI development. The limitations raise questions about regulatory approaches to frontier AI models.

cards.title: AI Transforming Retail Behind the Scenes
cards.body: AI is reshaping retail through backend decisions on product search, inventory, and recommendations rather than flashy customer-facing features. The transformation is invisible but fundamental to how shopping works.

cards.title: IBM Chip Technology Extends Moore's Law
cards.body: IBM unveiled a 100 billion transistor prototype with twice the density of its 2021 design, potentially extending Moore's Law another decade. The breakthrough enables faster, more energy-efficient computing for AI applications.
